description: Moments provider currently mixes remote listener hydration with local Drift watch and uses upsert-only persistence, which can leave stale rows after remote deletes and split read source-of-truth.
resolution: Before moments PowerSync rollout, enforce one authoritative read path and add deletion reconciliation when applying remote snapshots to local storage.

name: Notification flows should use local-first reads
description: Unread count is realtime but notification list and moment deep-link navigation still depend on remote fetches; align notifications with local-first providers to support offline push-navigation and future PowerSync domain migration.

name: Moments single read SoT
description: Moments pipeline now uses local Drift as the single read source-of-truth while remote reconciliation is handled by a dedicated keepAlive sync controller started at app bootstrap (momentsSyncControllerProvider in moments_providers plus main.dart startup read).

title: Keep wrapper-based offline media rendering
rationale: PowerSync syncs relational metadata, not binary media bytes or signed URL validity. Moments and avatars should keep local-first wrapper widgets (OfflineImage/AvatarImage) and avoid repeating online/offline branching in feature screens.

name: PowerSync stream SQL join compatibility
description: PowerSync sync-config validation rejected moments stream queries using unsupported join patterns; replacing broad LEFT JOIN + OR visibility clauses with multiple simple JOIN/WHERE queries allowed Validate Sync Config to pass while preserving scope.

title: PowerSync validation gate split
rationale: Treat powersync validate as two gates: sync SQL/schema correctness and runtime connection availability. Passing Validate Sync Config confirms stream query compatibility; failing Test Connections with PS_DATABASE_URI missing indicates environment setup only and should not block code-level P1 status updates.
